name: Utility-Based Value Model
description: Value derived from use and applicability of knowledge
edge_case_handling: Overestimation of utility requires usage telemetry fallback

name: License-First Access Model
description: Access governed by defined usage rights
implications: Enables controlled distribution and recurring revenue
edge_case_handling: License violation triggers automated revocation + audit

name: Preservation-Centric Model
description: Primary function is long-term retention of knowledge
edge_case_handling: Data format obsolescence requires migration plan

name: Operator-Controlled Infrastructure
description: Minting and distribution controlled by the operator
edge_case_handling: Operator unavailability requires delegated signer fallback

name: Platform-Independent Validity
description: Assets remain valid independent of external platforms
implications: Ensures assets survive platform changes or shutdowns
edge_case_handling: Multi-chain anchoring failure requires manual re-verification protocol
